findings.description: The North Carolina state flag image is significantly smaller in the HTML compared to the PDF, where it is prominently centered on the title page.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the NC flag is a large, centered image taking up roughly the top third of the slide. In the HTML, it appears much smaller and left-aligned.

findings.description: The DWR logo on the contact info page is significantly smaller in the HTML rendering compared to the PDF.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the DWR logo with 'Division of Water Resources' text is a prominent centered graphic. In the HTML, it is much smaller and left-aligned.

findings.description: The Venn diagram showing nested relationship between Water Supply Planning and River Basin Modeling is missing from the HTML, replaced with plain text labels.
findings.evidence: PDF shows two nested ellipses (green outer 'Water Supply Planning', orange inner 'River Basin Modeling'). HTML shows only plain text 'Water Supply Planning' and 'River Basin Modeling' with no diagram.

findings.description: Multiple h2 headings share the same text 'SAB – What It Is', reflecting the original slide titles but creating a confusing heading structure in a single HTML document. Additionally, the PDF has three separate slides titled 'SAB – What It Is' with different content, which could be disambiguated.
findings.evidence: Three separate h2 headings all titled 'SAB – What It Is' appear in the HTML, corresponding to pages 6, 7, and 8 of the PDF. While technically faithful to the slide titles, in a single-document HTML context this creates ambiguous structure.
